titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Paul H. Silverstone, Class of 1953, Yale College, Postcard Collection Documenting Yale University
Silverstone (Paul H), Class of 1953, Yale College, Postcard Collection Documenting Yale University
titlestmt.author: compiled by Christine Connolly

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday October 6, 2018 at 10:13
finding aid revisiion description not supplied

did.unittitle: Paul H. Silverstone, Class of 1953, Yale College, postcard collection documenting Yale University
did.abstract: The collection consists of souvenir postcards of Yale, most of which depict buildings and grounds. Also included are postcards depicting Yale athletics, symbols, and student life.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 48-A (YRG 48-A), Yale pictorial records and collections.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The materials were a gift of Paul H. Silverstone, 2004, 2008.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Paul H. Silverstone, Class of 1953, Yale College, Postcard Collection Documenting Yale University (RU 946). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The rmaterials are arranged by accession, thereunder alphabetically by publisher.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consists of souvenir postcards of Yale, most of which depict buildings and grounds. Also included are postcards depicting Yale athletics, symbols, and student life.

did.unittitle: American Art Works - Star Art Co.
Rock marking first site of Yale College, founded 1701, Saybrook, Connecticut
Elm Street looking north from College Street, New Haven, CT
Scroll & Key Senior Society Building, Yale University
Yale Field football game, Yale Field (#1420)
Sterling Law School Building, Yale University (#14)
Court, Sterling Law School, Yale University (#28)
Blount Avenue, Yale University, New Haven, CT
Bird's eye view showing Hotel Taft in the center of everything
President Taft delivering speech on the steps of Woodbridge Hall, Yale College, 1909
"College" series #993. sketch of woman with muff superimposed on blue "Yale"
Rock marking first site of Yale U., Old Saybrook (printed for James Pharmacy)
Sketch of woman in blue with "Yale"
Sketch of woman in blue Y sweater with Y banner and Rah!Rah!Rah!Yale! [on leather]
Hind's Honey and Almond Cream advertisement [stamp?] with Yale football player being tackled
